character.definition: (same as 噱) to laugh heartily; to roar with laughter, (in Shanghai dialect) a promotional gimmick, tone (of one's speech)
tool to clear out (as a drain) the water, (same as 函) a case; a small box
deep and broad (expanse of water); abyss
a row of carriages; a generation; a class, a series a kind; denotes the plural
long; length; excel in; leader; Kangxi radical 168
tufts of hair left on the heads of children after shaving
the sound of a knife cracking or breaking something; suddenly
